name: editor4c: arrow keys move the caret; subsequent typing lands at the moved position
_note: Phase B — arrow-key caret navigation. Formerly an _open_ blocker for two reasons: (1) the fixture used the DOM key name "ArrowRight" which event_sim did not map (→ key -1), now aliased to GLFW_KEY_RIGHT alongside "right"; the underlying rich caret nav (editing_controller_handle_rich_navigation) + caret→DOM-selection sync (state_store_commit_collapsed_caret → selectionchange) already worked. Home then ArrowRight positions the caret between A and B; typing X yields AXBC.
